## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX AI and Marketing Academy for CMO-focused events in New York and San Francisco.](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI is interested in participating in both NY (October) and SF events, with flexibility on format and topics](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Budget range: \~$15k for 45-50 person dinner events; open to cost-sharing for larger gatherings](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX AI to integrate their planned "Growth Summit" with Marketing Academy's SF event](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Focus on AI adoption challenges for CMOs and Marcel's journey from CMO to CEO as potential discussion topics](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Topics

### Event Formats and Audience Engagement

  - [Marketing Academy events typically host 20-40 attendees in an intimate, vulnerable setting](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [GrowthX AI prefers interactive formats over traditional product demos](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Marcel's successful webinars involve sharing personal experiences and answering specific audience questions](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Suggestion to avoid screen-sharing or explicit product demos to maintain audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Content Ideas for CMO Events

  - [Marcel's transition from CMO to CEO, including challenges and insights](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [AI adoption in marketing: common mistakes, challenges, and success stories](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Marcel's experience as first CMO at Skill.ai (recently in the news)](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [How CMOs can make the case for AI adoption to CFOs/CEOs](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Trends observed at GrowthX AI across various company sizes and industries](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [New York event: GrowthX AI interested in participating within Marketing Academy's existing format (October)](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [San Francisco event: Potential to combine GrowthX AI's planned "Growth Summit" with Marketing Academy's event](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Possibility of a "CMO Day" or "unconference" preceding the main event in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [GrowthX AI open to co-branding and partnership for increased event impact](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Budget and Logistics

  - [GrowthX AI currently budgets \~$15k for 45-50 person dinner events](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Open to cost-sharing for larger gatherings, but cautious about high per-head costs](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Marketing Academy primarily seeks cost offset from sponsors](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [GrowthX AI planning multiple events around major conferences and own "Growth Summit"](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Additional GrowthX AI Initiatives

  - [AILiveGrowth.com community launched but not yet heavily promoted](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Planning a 6-week live course with cohort-based structure to drive membership](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Candy to shared Slack channel for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Candy to share meeting insights with her team and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Finalize New York event details (scheduled for October)](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Explore potential integration of GrowthX AI's "Growth Summit" with Marketing Academy's San Francisco event](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Determine specific format, topics, and budget for both NY and SF events within the next 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2bsaEdz7fLnZVhKyABGGkhzikX5zhfZc?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
